query_title: The NeverEnding Story II: The Next Chapter

recommendations.title: Andre
recommendations.overview: The true story of how a marine seal named Andre befriended a little girl and her family, circa 1962.

recommendations.title: The Man from Snowy River
recommendations.overview: Jim Craig has lived his first 18 years in the mountains of Australia on his father's farm. The death of his father forces him to go to the lowlands to earn enough money to get the farm back on its feet.

recommendations.title: Robinson Crusoe
recommendations.overview: Robinson Crusoe flees Britain on a ship after killing his friend over the love of Mary. A fierce ocean storm wrecks his ship and leaves him stranded by himself on an uncharted island. Left to fend for himself, Crusoe seeks out a tentative survival on

recommendations.title: The Conjuring
recommendations.overview: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse. Forced to confront a powerful entity, the Warrens find themselves caught in the most terrifying case of their lives.

recommendations.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: Long ago, in the fantasy world of Kumandra, humans and dragons lived together in harmony. But when an evil force threatened the land, the dragons sacrificed themselves to save humanity. Now, 500 years later, that same evil has returned and it’s up to

recommendations.title: The Spirit of Christmas
recommendations.overview: A woman falls in love with a man who is somewhat unavailable.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Guardians
recommendations.overview: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs and imagination of children all over the world.

recommendations.title: Dragons: Dawn of the Dragon Racers
recommendations.overview: A hunt for a lost sheep turns into a competition between Hiccup and friends as they compete to become the first Dragon Racing champion of Berk.

recommendations.title: Nirvana: Unplugged In New York
recommendations.overview: A live album by American rock band Nirvana, the album features an acoustic performance recorded at Sony Music Studios in New York City on 18 November 1993, for the television series MTV Unplugged.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! The Sword and the Scoob
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Mystery, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: An evil sorceress transports the gang back to the age of chivalrous knights, spell-casting wizards, and fire-breathing dragons.
recommendations.director: Maxwell Atoms, Christina Sotta, Melchior Zwyer
